validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

username.reloginDescription: Changing your username ends all active sessions. Please sign in again with your new username.
username.policyDescription: You can change your username at most once every {{days}} days.
username.policyCooldownActive: A change is not possible right now. Next change allowed from {{date}} (UTC).
username.policyChangeAllowed: You can change your username now.
username.policyLastChanged: Last changed: {{date}} (UTC). You can change your username again now.
username.policySuperAdminExempt: As SuperAdmin you are exempt from cooldown and change limits.
